sub_modules.fft16_index_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage controller index generator for butterfly operand addresses and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 cosine and sine table entries.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT and IFFT twiddle sign selection.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output scaling block that passes FFT results unchanged and normalizes IFFT results by N=16.
